Appearances: Kyle Nordrehaug of Law Offices of Blumenthal, Nordrehaug & Bhowmik telephone number 858-551-1223 for Plaintiff.
Cameron Cole of Venable LLP telephone number 415-653-3708 for Defendants.
Daniel Chammas of Venable LLP telephone number 310-229-0302 appeared by telephone for Defendants.

Mr. Nordrehaug represented to the Court that the settlement agreement was served on the Labor & Workforce Development Agency after granting of the preliminary apporoval, and that all findings are true and accurate and can not be controverted. The Court approved PLAINTIFF FATIMA GUILLEN'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement based on the representation of Counsel. Final approval order and judgment signed in open Court. Attorneys fees are incorporated in the final approval order.

Mtn To Compel Responses And Docs In Re: Pltf'S Req For Production Set 4
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Aparajit Bhowmik, Esq. of Blumenthal Nordrehaug & Bhowmik, Tel. 858.551.1223 ext3, for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;
Daniel B. Chammas, Esq. of Venable LLP, Tel. 310.229.0302, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF FATIMA GUILLEN'S Motion To Compel Responses And Documents In Re: Plaintiff's Request For Production Set 4 to Defendant Univision Television Group, Inc. is granted. Defendant Univision Television Group, Inc. shall promptly produce wage statements of the class members in Excel or a reasonably equivalent electronic spreadsheet within 20 days. Parties are to divide the cost of production. No monetary sanctions are awarded. The Court modified and signed the order submitted by plaintiff's counsel by email. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Wendy Arlen, CRR# 4355 (Tel. 415.357.4300).
